sys_script_include.description:
This Script include is provided as an example.
To reset the Taske Number counter yearly, you will need to add this script include or something that peforms the counter reset into the global application.
Once this script include is addedintoo global, you will need to give Tasker permissions to call this script include.
See the Tasker Script Include "TaskerDisplayValueConfiguration" (x_153465_discovert.TaskerDisplayValueConfiguration) TaskerDisplayValueConfiguration is an unprotected script include provided by Discover Technologies to allow customers to change how the Tasker Number is generated.
There is a function that sets the Task Tree number in this script include called:
sys_script_include.name: CounterReset
